Hi David! Welcome to Sao Paulo. How was your flight?
Hi Maisa! Thank you. The flight was long, and I am a little tired.
I understand. What is the weather like in New York?
It is cold and rainy there. Here it is warm and sunny. I like it!
Yes, today is beautiful. How was your weekend?
It was great. I visited a museum. By the way, have you been to New York?
Not yet, but I want to go. Was there a lot of traffic from the airport?
A little, but it was fine. Thank you for the warm welcome!
Welcome to Sao Paulo. How was your flight?
What is the weather like in New York?
Today it is warm and sunny.

Hi Maisa, this is David. I am here in Sao Paulo now. The flight was very long, and I am a little tired today. But the city is beautiful. The weather here is warm and sunny. In New York it is cold and rainy this week, so this is very nice for me. There was some traffic from the airport, but it was fine. My weekend was great. I visited a museum and I tried Brazilian coffee. By the way, I really like it. See you at the office. Thank you!

Hello, this is Sarah from the office. Let me tell you about my weekend. It was really nice and relaxing. On Saturday the weather was sunny, so I went to the park with a friend. On Sunday it was rainy, so I stayed home and watched a movie. I was a little tired, but it was a good weekend. By the way, have you been to the new coffee shop near the office? The coffee there is great. There is a lot of traffic in the morning, so come early. Have a nice day!
Hi David, welcome to Sao Paulo. How was your flight? What is the weather like in New York? By the way, have you been to Brazil before? See you at the office.
